mdRecord.dcterms:title: 1775 A Map of the most Inhabited part of Virginia containing the whole Province of Maryland with Part of Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and North Carolina
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Map of A Map of the most Inhabited part of Virginia containing the whole Province of Maryland with Part of Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and North Carolina, Map 12
mdRecord.dcterms:spatial: Eastern Virginia, Maryland, Delaware, Pennsylvania, and New Jersey
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
